title.en: With that, his replica body was gone.

content.en:
"It's finally out!"

Jian Heng and them breathed a sigh of relief as if they had survived the catastrophe.

They didn't expect Ye Tian to really break through the tornado of the legendary bitter sea, but Ye Tian really did it.

At this time, Ye Tian's duplicate body, which had not yet been replaced, spoke: "Three, my clone will leave first." "

With that, his replica body was gone.

The other replica body continued to take Jian Heng and them to find the body of the Sword Clan Elder.

And after leaving a distance, Ye Tian condensed another copy body and replaced this copy body, so that the strength of the copy body could be kept consistent with other copy bodies!

......

"The Legend of the Sea of Bitterness has many opportunities, as well as the legendary Gu Shajing that transforms the body of legends, I also have to look for it and try to find some. "

Ye Tian shuttled in the other direction.

He is not afraid of falling, if it really falls, it will be enough to condense a replica body.

Anyway, he is alone, and he is not afraid of being discovered.

Soon, he encountered a Legendary Bitter Beast, whose strength was equivalent to that of the top Legendary Dao Realm.

Ye Tian urged his Dragon Scale Legend, Red Dragon Legend, Ancient Ape Legend, and Golden Cicada Legend, and the terrifying aura burst out, and with the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules, he killed this legendary bitter beast in one blow in seconds, and the other party didn't even have scum left.

"It's a terrifying attack, it's too easy to kill these legendary bitter beasts with my current strength, here, even an ordinary patriarch is not my opponent!" Ye Tian muttered.

He hadn't fought against a real patriarch, but if he was in the outside world, it was estimated that even the ordinary patriarch who had just broken through was no match for him.

In fact, he is now a veteran combat force.

Gradually, Ye Tian's replica body also penetrated into the depths of the legendary bitter sea.

"Island!"

Ye Tian saw a huge island and immediately shuttled over.

He learned that the good things in the Bitter Sea can only be found on some islands, and the legend says that there are no good things at the bottom of the Bitter Sea, so he didn't waste time searching for them at the bottom of the sea.

However, he came to the vicinity of the island and did not immediately go in.

In his perception, the island seemed to have the ability to devour him, and it was full of unknown dangers.

"Legend has it that in the bitter sea, any chance is accompanied by danger, and the same is true of this island, but the more dangerous the place, the more opportunities there will be!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He struck directly and attacked the island.

The dense second sequence of supreme rules crossed the void and shrouded the island from all directions of time and space, intending to crush it.

Then.

Vines spread out from the interior of the island, and each vine contained terrifying power.

Bang!!!!

A terrifying Legendary Bitter Beast appeared, composed of countless vines, and its strength was much stronger than the Legendary Bitter Beast encountered before.

【Vine Monster】

This is the name detected by the Copy Talent.

"It's strong, but it's still up to it!"

Ye Tianti shot and killed him.

Thundered!!!!!

Under the continuous fighting, this area seemed to have been shattered countless times, and the vines of the vine giant demon were also crushed by Ye Tian with his strong strength.

Time passed, and the vine monster's injuries gradually worsened, but it was unable to escape from this place.

In the end, he was killed by Ye Tian, and his body was broken into countless pieces and fell on the island.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian walked on the island and began to look for good things.

Soon, he found the treasure in the vine troll's lair.

It was a white stone with various patterns on it, exuding a strange atmosphere.

"This is the legendary ancient tooth stone!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

Legend Gu Tooth Stone is the same as Legend Gu Sha Jing, both are treasures that help the Legendary Body transform, but the Legendary Ancient Tooth Stone is a little worse, but it still has great value, and if the number is enough, it can still make the Legend Body transform.

And the legend here is not just a little bit of ancient tooth stone, but a vein!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to mine, digging up the legendary ancient tooth stone here little by little.

It didn't take long for him to dig up tens of thousands of legendary ancient tooth stones.

After that, he continued to search for resources on this island, but only found some less precious resources, which may be of great value to ordinary legends to the Dao realm, but not of much value to him.

Of course, he also took it away, he didn't need it, he could throw it to the Terran Temple, let those Terran powerhouses exchange it, and cultivate Terran powerhouses.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian and Jian Heng gradually went deeper into the depths of the Legendary Bitter Sea, and there were more dangers here, and the Legendary Bitter Beasts they encountered became more and more powerful.

Then.

Jian Heng said: "Elder Ye, the body of our Sword Clan Ancestor is not far from here!"

Hearing this, the other two Sword Clan Legends to the Dao Realm all breathed a sigh of relief.

There are so many dangers along the way that they really don't want to stay here, and it would be great if they could find them sooner.

"We have to be careful, the closer we get, the more dangerous it is!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Jian Heng nodded approvingly.

Even the patriarch-level ancestors had fallen, so they naturally had to be extremely careful.

In the next area, they found that they had not encountered a single legendary bitter beast.

That's not a good thing.

This means that this area is really dangerous, and even those legendary bitter beasts dare not enter.

"It's almost there!"

Jian Heng was nervous.

And Ye Tian used his copying talent to cover the surroundings all the time, probing unknown creatures and preventing danger.

Moreover, his power is hidden, ready to strike at any time.

"It's an island!"

Ye Tian saw it.

And soon, Jian Heng and they also saw it.

It was an unimaginably large island, and on top of the island, there were a large number of corpses of strange creatures, and deep on the island, a middle-aged man knelt there, and his body was torn open.

"It's the Ancestor!"

Jian Heng looked sad.

"Sword Clan Patriarch - Jian Xuan!"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The creatures on this island don't seem to be strong, why didn't Jian Xuan even escape, and died here.

He used his copy talent to probe, but only on the surface, and a force deep in the island blocked his copy talent perception.

It is clear that something more dangerous exists on the island.

However, Jian Xuan should have been able to sense it, but he still ran to the island, and died in battle.

It's weird!

"Unless Jian Xuan saw something that made him extremely eager and was ready to fight, but he lost!"

Ye Tian guessed.
